sampleRecalls.title: Mikario Trading Convertible Baby Gyms Recalled Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death from Suffocation; Violate Mandatory Standard for Infant Support Cushions; Sold on TikTok Shop
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Mikario Trading's 5-in-1 baby gyms. The recalled baby gyms convert from an activity center to a tummy-time pillow mat.
